citation: Campanella G, Hanna MG, Geneslaw L, et al. Clinical-grade computational pathology using weakly supervised deep learning on whole slide images. Nat Med. 2019;25(8):1301-1309.
case_summary: Large-scale pathology AI study achieving clinical-grade performance but dependent on specific scanner/preparation conditions.
